title: The Fed - April 28-29, 2026 FOMC Meeting
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: The Fed held the fed funds rate steady at the April 28-29, 2026 FOMC meeting, maintaining the status quo amid unchanged economic outlook and elevated energy pri
excerpt: The Fed held the fed funds rate steady at the April 28-29, 2026 FOMC meeting, maintaining the status quo amid unchanged economic outlook and elevated energy prices. Minor changes were made to the policy statement. The decision was largely expected.

content.introduction: The Fed held the fed funds rate steady at the April 28-29, 2026 FOMC meeting, maintaining the status quo amid unchanged economic outlook and elevated energy prices. Minor changes were made to the policy statement. The decision was largely expected.
body: r/bondmarket - Fed expected to hold rates at January FOMC meeting ... Fed Decision on April 29 Could Trigger Major Market Move · r/AltScope

# TD Economics - U.S. FOMC Meeting (April 28-29, 2026).
